title: bus.hearth.session.ended v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's session_events module when a previously tracked session disappears from the hearth-session cache (tmux pane gone). Only emitted for sessions that previously emitted a 'started' event — phantom sessions that came and went without a pane are silently dropped. Consumers use this to remove the session from the phone list.

ended_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the session was detected as gone.
